claim_sql:
11:  * each round: claim a batch (1 PG conn, committed immediately), GATHER each
18:   atlas-enrich-worker@ fleet via FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED (no row is double-claimed).
163:    conn.commit()
178:        cur.execute('SELECT %s FROM "%s"."%s" WHERE "%s"=%%s'
183:    conn.commit()
201:        rows = w.claim_batch(conn, worker_id, CLAIM)  # committed; [(qid,bid,task)]
261:        cur.execute("SELECT id FROM atlas.enrich_queue WHERE status IN ('pending','error') "
262:                    "ORDER BY priority,id FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED LIMIT 1")
266:        ok.append("SKIP LOCKED claim probe (rolled back)")
queue_indexes:
enrich_queue_pkey:CREATE UNIQUE INDEX enrich_queue_pkey ON atlas.enrich_queue USING btree (id)
enrich_queue_business_id_task_type_key:CREATE UNIQUE INDEX enrich_queue_business_id_task_type_key ON atlas.enrich_queue USING btree (business_id, task_type)
enrich_queue_claim_idx:CREATE INDEX enrich_queue_claim_idx ON atlas.enrich_queue USING btree (status, priority, id) WHERE (status = 'pending'::text)
